title: AI Carbon Footprint Predictor and RAG Sustainability Advisor
bullets: Achieved 82.6% pairwise ranking accuracy for CO₂ estimates on a calibrated platform.
Delivered actionable insights with 89.7% calibrated coverage on 524 unseen products.
Implemented end-to-end predictions with an average latency of ~80 ms using advanced ML techniques.

title: AI Research Assistant Pipeline
bullets: Developed a multi-agent LangGraph system with self-critique for advanced end-to-end research reporting.
Implemented dual-layer memory architecture using ChromaDB to enhance research context across sessions.
Created a live-streaming UI for real-time monitoring of agent activities and report generation.

title: AI-Powered Legal Conflict Resolver
bullets: Developed an AI system achieving >85% validation accuracy for detecting contradictions in legal documents.
Implemented a FastAPI backend integrating natural language inference with significant reduction in false positives.
Engineered a user-friendly interface using Next.js, enabling rapid document analysis in under 3 seconds.
